---
pagetitle: "PULSE Home"
subtitle: ""
toc: false
date: ""
sidebar: false
image: ""
format:
  html:
    css: "assets/css/home.css"
    number-sections: false
    title-block-banner: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  freeze: false
---

::: {.home-container}
::: {.home-grid-parent}
::: {.home-grid-child-left}

## [SciLifeLab PULSE Training]{.large}
### Not your average postdoctoral program
:::{style="margin-bottom:1em;"}

:::

The SciLifeLab Program for Future Leaders in Life Science (PULSE) is a Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions COFUND program designed to connect early-career researchers with opportunities and skills that support long-term career sustainability across sectors. 

The PULSE training program has been developed using the [European Competency Framework for Researchers](https://research-and-innovation.ec.europa.eu/jobs-research/researchcomp-european-competence-framework-researchers_en) (ResearchComp). This website contains all training modules and resources developed and delivered in the PULSE program.

![](assets/logos/SciLifeLab-green.png){height="1.5em"} &nbsp;   ![](assets/logos/EN_Co-fundedbytheEU_RGB_POS.png){height="1.5em" style="margin-bottom:-3px;"}

---

::: small
Updated: {{< meta current_date >}} at {{< meta current_time >}}.
:::

:::
:::{.home-grid-child-right}

![](assets/images/PULSE.jpeg){.nolightbox}

:::
:::
:::
